zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Heath於1620年出生在英國時，她的父親John Heath17歲，母親Dorothy Royale15歲。她於1640年11月12日與John Leonard在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她於1640年移民到美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德。她去世於1711年11月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年91歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Heath于1620年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Heath17岁，母亲Dorothy Royale15岁。她于1640年11月12日与John Leonard在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她于1640年移民到美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德。她去世于1711年11月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年91岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Heath
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(on the) heath’ (Middle English he(a)th, Old English hǣth) or else a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. The same word also denoted heather, the characteristic plant of heathland areas. This surname has also been established in Dublin, Ireland, since the late 16th century.

variants.name: Haith
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): variant of   Heath  .

variants.name: Heathman
meanings: English: topographic name denoting a dweller ‘on the heath’, from Middle English he(a)th + man(ne). Compare Heath and Heather .

variants.name: Hatton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

variants.name: Heather
meanings: English: topographic name denoting a ‘dweller on the heath’, an agent derivative of Middle English hethe; compare Heath . The name may also be habitational name from Heather (Leicestershire), from Old English hǣthor ‘heathland’ (hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + the noun suffix -or) or hǣddre ‘heather’. This surname is widespread in southern England, and also established in Ireland.

variants.name: Health
meanings: Altered form of English and Scottish   Heath  .
English and Scottish: perhaps a nickname from the vocabulary word health. — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is 105.

variants.name: Hoad
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, from Middle English hoth ‘heath’ (Old English hāth, a byform of Old English hǣth), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Hoath in Kent. This form was restricted in the Middle Ages to southeastern England, and the surname is still largely confined to Kent, Surrey, and Sussex. Compare Heath .

variants.name: Heid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Eckhart, Gerd, Gotthilf, Heinz, Klaus, Konrad, Kurt, Manfred, Ralf, Uli.
German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name from Middle High German heide, German Heide ‘heath, moor, open, uncultivated land’. Compare Heath .
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Haido, a short form of any of various compound names beginning with haid ‘heath’ (i.e. wasteland, often with heather).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Heath was born in 1620, in England, her father, John Heath, was 17 and her mother, Dorothy Royale, was 15. She married John Leonard on 12 November 1640, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters. She immigrated to Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States in 1640. She died on 23 November 1711, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 91, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Heath est née en 1620, à Angleterre, son père, John Heath, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Royale, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé John Leonard le 12 novembre 1640, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 8 filles. Elle a immigré au Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1640. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1711, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Heath 1620 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Heath 17 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Royale 15. Sie hat am 12. November 1640 in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Leonard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie ist 1640 nach Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten eingewandert. Sie starb am 23. November 1711 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Heath è nata il nel 1620 nel England, sua padre, John Heath, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Royale, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato John Leonard il 12 novembre 1640, nel Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 8 figlie. Immigrata nel Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1640. Morì il 23 novembre 1711, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Heathが1620年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Heathは17歳，母Dorothy Royaleは15歳であった。1640年11月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドでJohn Leonardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1640年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドに移住した。彼女は1711年11月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで91歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Heath(이)가 1620년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Heath(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Royale(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1640년 11월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 John Leonard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1640년에 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1711년 11월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Heath nasceu em 1620, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Heath, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Royale, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com John Leonard em 12 de novembro de 1640, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1640. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1711, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Heath родилась в 1620 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Heath было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Royale, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Leonard 12 ноября 1640 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она иммигрировала в спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1640 году. Она умерла 23 ноября 1711 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Heath nació en 1620, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Heath, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Dorothy Royale, tenía 15 años. Se casó con John Leonard el 12 de noviembre de 1640, en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 8 hijas. Inmigró a Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1640. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1711, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
